audit_items.proof_trace: The two explicit FreeString calls (TestStringAppend L88, TestStringAppendAM L102) are each followed by an immediate return with no further use of the freed pointer. String pointers derived via StringPtrLen/CallReplyStringPtr (TestMatchReply L44, TestAssertStringReply L321-322, TestNotifications L197/207/217) are fully consumed within the same scope before any reassignment of the underlying object. Memory leaks exist (e.g., mystr in TestMatchReply is never freed) but are distinct from use-after-free.
